privacy_meta_desc: Learn how OneForMind protects your data, privacy, and ensures your security.
privacy_meta_og_desc: We believe your habits and finances are your own business. Read our privacy policy.
privacy_subtitle: We build tools to help you take control of your life, not to exploit your personal information. Transparency is our default.
privacy_tldr_1_desc: We never sell your personal information or financial data to third parties.
privacy_tldr_2_desc: You own your data. You can export or permanently delete your account at any time.
privacy_tldr_3_desc: Your financial records and habits are encrypted in transit and at rest.
privacy_tldr_4_desc: We only use essential cookies to keep you logged in and functional analytics.
privacy_doc_intro: This Privacy Policy describes how OneForMind ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use our web application, tools, and services.
privacy_p_collection: We believe in data minimization. We only collect what is strictly necessary to make the app work for you.
privacy_li_collection_1_desc: Name, email address, and authentication credentials (if not using Google OAuth).
privacy_li_collection_2_desc: Habit logs, financial entries, journal notes, and planner tasks.
privacy_li_collection_2_strong: This data is strictly private to your account.
privacy_li_collection_3_desc: Basic analytics such as IP address, browser type, and operating system to help us debug errors.
privacy_p_usage: Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve the OneForMind experience. Specifically, we use it to:
privacy_li_usage_1: Provide you with the core functionalities (habit tracking, financial insights, task management).
privacy_li_usage_2: Send you important account notifications (e.g., password resets).
privacy_li_usage_3: Analyze anonymous, aggregated usage patterns to improve our UI/UX.
privacy_finance_note_desc: We are not a bank. We do not connect directly to your bank accounts. All financial data is manually inputted by you and is used solely to generate personal insights.
privacy_p_security: We implement standard industry practices to protect your data. Our databases are secured, and we enforce HTTPS/SSL for all communications. Passwords are securely hashed using modern cryptographic algorithms.
privacy_p_cookies: OneForMind uses "cookies" to remember your session and preferences (like Dark mode). We do not use intrusive third-party advertising trackers on our dashboard.
privacy_p_thirdparty: We share data only with service providers who help us operate, such as Payment Gateways (Midtrans/Stripe) to process payments and Google (for OAuth).
privacy_p_rights: Depending on your location, you have the right to:
privacy_li_rights_1: Access the personal information we hold about you.
privacy_li_rights_2: Request the correction of inaccurate data.
privacy_li_rights_3: Request the permanent deletion of your account and all associated data.
privacy_p_contact: If you have any questions or data deletion requests, please reach out to us:
privacy_contact_sla: We typically respond within 24-48 business hours.
privacy_export_desc: We don't hold your data hostage. You can download a complete backup of your habits, finances, and journals anytime.
privacy_faq_1_q: Can your team read my private journal entries?
privacy_faq_1_a: No. We have strict internal access controls. Unless you explicitly share an error log with our support team, your user-generated content remains entirely private.
privacy_faq_2_q: Do you sell my data to advertisers?
privacy_faq_2_a: Absolutely not. Our business model is based on providing a great productivity tool, not acting as a data broker.
privacy_faq_3_q: How do I delete my account?
privacy_faq_3_a: You can delete your account permanently directly from your Profile Settings inside the dashboard. This action will wipe all your data from our servers.
privacy_cta_desc: Join thousands of users who trust OneForMind for their daily productivity.
terms_meta_desc: Read the rules regarding the use of OneForMind. Clear, transparent, and fair terms of service.
terms_meta_og_desc: The agreement between you and OneForMind.
terms_subtitle: By using OneForMind, you agree to these terms. Think of this as the handshake before we start building your productivity system together.
terms_intro_text: Welcome to OneForMind. These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your access to and use of our services.
terms_intro_sub: Please read them carefully. By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, then you may not access the Service.
terms_p_eligibility: Our services are not for everyone. To maintain a safe and legal environment, you must meet the following criteria:
terms_eligibility_1: Must be at least 13 years old
terms_p_rules: We encourage productivity, not chaos. When using OneForMind, you agree to play by the rules.
terms_rules_do_1: Use the app to track your own habits and finances.
terms_rules_do_3: Respect the integrity of our servers.
terms_rules_dont_1: Attempt to hack or reverse engineer the API.
terms_rules_dont_2: Use the service for illegal activities.
terms_rules_dont_3: Share your account with multiple people.
terms_p_payment: Some features of OneForMind are billed on a subscription basis ('Subscription(s)'). You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis.
terms_li_payment_1_desc: Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the end of the current period. Failure to cancel is the user's responsibility.
terms_li_payment_2_desc: We use official payment gateway partners. We do not store your credit card information on OneForMind's servers.
terms_p_intellectual: All content, design, logos, and software architecture of OneForMind are our exclusive property. You are granted a limited license for personal use.
terms_p_termination: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, for breach of terms, fraud, or AI misuse without refund obligation.
terms_legal_caps: ONEFORMIND IS A PRODUCTIVITY AID. WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR FINANCIAL DECISIONS, DATA LOSS DUE TO USER ERROR, OR UNMET TARGETS. THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED 'AS IS'.
terms_cta_desc: By clicking 'I Agree', you acknowledge that you have read and understood these terms.
terms_cta_note: Security and privacy are our top priorities.
sec_meta_desc: How OneForMind secures your habits, finances, and personal journals with professional-grade encryption.
sec_meta_og_desc: Explore our security architecture and data protection protocols.
sec_subtitle: Security isn't a feature; it's the bedrock of everything we build. We protect your most sensitive data with bank-grade protocols and transparency.
sec_p_infrastructure: Our infrastructure is built on world-class platforms designed for high availability and maximum resilience against external threats.
sec_li_infra_1_desc: All data is hosted in Tier-4 data centers with 24/7 physical security and redundant power systems.
sec_li_infra_2_desc: We use advanced firewalls and DDoS protection to prevent unauthorized access at the network level.
sec_li_infra_3_desc: Encrypted backups are performed daily and tested regularly to ensure zero data loss scenarios.
sec_p_encryption: We treat every byte of your data—from your daily habits to your financial records—as strictly confidential.
sec_li_enc_1_desc: All communication between your device and our servers is secured using TLS 1.3 encryption.
sec_li_enc_2_desc: Sensitive fields in our database, such as journal entries and finance details, are encrypted using AES-256.
sec_p_application: Security is baked into our development lifecycle, from the first line of code to final deployment.
sec_li_app_1_desc: We enforce hashed passwords and offer secure Google OAuth integration to keep your account safe.
sec_li_app_2_desc: Active sessions are monitored and automatically expired to prevent unauthorized access from borrowed devices.
sec_p_sovereignty: You are the sole owner of your data. We do not have 'backdoors', and we do not sell your data to any third party under any circumstances.
sec_cta_title: Your mind deserves a safe space.
sec_cta_desc: Start building your productivity system with the peace of mind that your data is protected by the best standards.
refund_meta_desc: Complete information regarding refund procedures, subscription cancellations, and our commitment to user satisfaction.
refund_meta_og_desc: Payment transparency and refund policy for OneForMind users.
refund_subtitle: We want you to feel safe in your investment in growth. Here are the rules regarding refunds and cancellations.
refund_intro_text: At OneForMind, we are committed to providing the best value for your productivity. However, we understand if situations arise where our service doesn't meet your expectations.
refund_p_guarantee: We offer a 14-day 'No-Questions-Asked' guarantee period for the first-time purchase of our Pro or Lifetime plans.
refund_li_guarantee_1: Only applies to the first purchase on a new account.
refund_li_guarantee_2: If you have consumed AI features excessively within those 14 days, we reserve the right to decline or issue a partial refund.
refund_p_process: To maintain transaction security, refund requests must be made via our official email using the address registered to your OneForMind account.
refund_p_cancellation: You have full control over your subscription. Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours before the next billing date.
refund_li_cancellation_1: Cancellations can be made directly in Account Settings > Billing.
refund_li_cancellation_2: Automatic renewals that are not cancelled according to the procedure are non-refundable.
refund_p_exclusion: Refunds will not be processed if there are indications of intentional system abuse, bot activity, or gross violations of our Terms of Service. Payment audit decisions are final.
refund_cta_desc: Our team is ready to help if you encounter technical issues during the payment process or app usage.
